name: uuki/schemable-validator-core
description: Schemable Validator core — schema-based validation with JSON Schema IR

suggest.respect/validation: Enables the RespectAdapter engine and Respect driver (RespectRules). Not needed for the default dependency-free NativeAdapter.
suggest.opis/json-schema: Enables OpisAdapter (strict JSON Schema 2020-12 backend). Not needed for the default NativeAdapter.
